about.label: INSTITUTIONAL PROFILE
about.title:
Built for Global
Procurement Teams.
about.p1: Organic Scales International is a Bangladesh fish scales exporter with deep sourcing networks across freshwater aquaculture regions. We supply export-grade raw materials to pharmaceutical manufacturers, cosmetic formulators, and food processors requiring consistent particle size, moisture content, and batch traceability.
about.p2: Our operations prioritize sustainable harvesting partnerships and full chain-of-custody documentation. Every lot is traceable from collection point through drying, inspection, and export packaging · meeting institutional procurement standards for marine collagen raw material and bulk fish scales.
about.p3: From our Dhaka procurement office, we coordinate FOB and CIF shipments to 14+ countries with dedicated export documentation, third-party lab certificates, and flexible MOQ structures for tilapia scales export and carp scale programs.
about.imagePortAlt: Export port with container handling for bulk shipments
about.imageExportAlt: Stacked shipping containers ready for sea export

sourcing.text: Certified aquaculture partners across Bangladesh freshwater production zones.

specsSheet.title: Technical specifications
specsSheet.note: Values are typical export-grade targets. Batch-specific COA issued per shipment.

tilapiaDriedPharma.name: Tilapia Dried Scales · Pharmaceutical Grade
tilapiaDriedPharma.description: Low-moisture dried tilapia scales for collagen peptide extraction and pharmaceutical applications. Batch-tested for purity.

tilapiaWetCollagen.name: Tilapia Wet Scales · Collagen Extract Grade
tilapiaWetCollagen.description: Fresh-processed wet scales optimized for hydrolyzed collagen production. Ideal for cosmetic and nutraceutical manufacturers.

carpFoodGrade.name: Carp Scales · Food Processing Grade
carpFoodGrade.description: Food-safe carp scales for gelatin, thickening agents, and specialty food applications. HACCP-aligned processing.

carpCosmeticGrade.name: Carp Scales · Cosmetic Grade
carpCosmeticGrade.description: Refined carp scale material for premium skincare and beauty formulations. Consistent particle grading.

marineIndustrial.name: Marine Mixed Scales · Industrial Grade
marineIndustrial.description: Mixed marine species scales for industrial collagen, adhesive, and composite material applications at volume.

customClientSpec.name: Custom Processed Scales · Client Spec Grade
customClientSpec.description: Tailored drying, milling, and packaging per your technical specification. MOQ negotiable for dedicated programs.

faq.label: PROCUREMENT FAQ
faq.title:
Common questions
from buyers.
faq.subtitle: Answers for sourcing managers evaluating Bangladesh fish scale suppliers for bulk programs.
faq.supportText: Email procurement@organicscales.com with your spec sheet · we respond within one business day.

moq.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
moq.a: Standard MOQ is 500 kg per product line. Custom-processed grades start at 250 kg. Volume discounts apply above 2 MT per shipment.

grades.a: We export pharmaceutical, cosmetic, food-processing, and industrial grades across tilapia, carp, and marine categories, plus Client Spec custom processing.

shipping.q: What shipping terms do you offer?
shipping.a: FOB Bangladesh or CIF to your port. We prepare commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and lab COAs per batch.

samples.a: Yes. Sample kits (500 g to 2 kg) are available for qualified institutional buyers after specification confirmation.

payment.a: Typical terms are 30% advance, 70% against scanned BL copy. LC at sight available for established accounts.

traceability.a: Each lot receives a unique batch ID linking collection date, processing stage, lab results, and export documentation.

policy.label: INSTITUTIONAL POLICIES
policy.title:
Policies for
institutional buyers.
policy.subtitle: Privacy, terms of use, and export quality standards governing how OSI handles data and commercial engagements.

privacy.intro: Organic Scales International (OSI) respects the confidentiality of procurement inquiries and buyer data submitted through this website.
privacy.updated: Last updated: May 2025. Contact procurement@organicscales.com for data requests.

s1.title: Information we collect
s1.body: We collect information you provide in RFQ forms (company name, contact details, product interest, quantities, and messages), technical logs (IP address, browser type), and communications you send to our procurement desk.

s2.title: How we use information
s2.body: Data is used to respond to quotes, coordinate export shipments, maintain buyer records, improve our services, and meet legal obligations. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

s3.title: Storage & security
s3.body: Inquiry data is stored in secured cloud infrastructure (Firebase/Google Cloud) with access restricted to authorized OSI staff. We apply industry-standard transport encryption (SSL/TLS) on this site.

s4.title: Your rights
s4.body: Buyers may request access, correction, or deletion of personal data by emailing procurement@organicscales.com. We respond within 30 days where applicable under GDPR or local privacy laws.

terms.intro: By using the OSI website and submitting procurement inquiries, you agree to the following terms.
terms.updated: Last updated: May 2025. Governing law: People's Republic of Bangladesh.

s1.title: Website use
s1.body: Content on this site is for institutional B2B evaluation only. You may not scrape, redistribute, or misrepresent OSI product specifications without written consent.

s2.title: Quotes & contracts
s2.body: RFQ submissions do not constitute a binding contract. Prices, MOQ, grades, and delivery terms are confirmed only in a signed proforma invoice or sales agreement issued by OSI.

s3.title: Product information
s3.body: Catalog descriptions and spec sheets are indicative. Final COA, moisture, particle size, and microbiological limits are defined per batch and buyer specification.

s4.title: Limitation of liability
s4.body: OSI is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of this website. Liability for export lots is governed by the applicable sales contract and Incoterms agreed with the buyer.

quality.intro: OSI quality and export policies align with institutional procurement requirements for fish scale raw materials.
quality.updated: Last updated: May 2025. Batch-specific COAs issued per shipment.

s1.title: Quality management
s1.body: Each lot undergoes sorting, cleaning, controlled drying, inspection, and third-party lab testing where required. Non-conforming material is segregated and not released for export.

s2.title: Documentation
s2.body: Standard export packs include commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, phytosanitary certificates where applicable, and certificate of analysis (COA) per batch.

s3.title: Traceability
s3.body: Batch IDs link collection date, processing records, lab results, and export packaging. Buyers receive traceability summaries on request for audit purposes.

s4.title: Claims & disputes
s4.body: Quality claims must be reported in writing within 14 days of arrival with batch ID and supporting evidence. OSI will review jointly with the buyer and propose remediation per contract terms.

rfq.label: PROCUREMENT INQUIRY
rfq.title:
Request a
Bulk Quote.
rfq.subtitle: Submit your specifications for pharmaceutical, cosmetic, or food-grade fish scales. Our Dhaka procurement desk responds to qualified institutional buyers within one business day.
rfq.formHint: Fields marked * are required. Minimum order 100 kg.
rfq.moqHint: Standard MOQ 500 kg per line · custom from 250 kg
rfq.messagePlaceholder: Describe your specifications, delivery timeline, and incoterms preference...
rfq.successBody: Thank you. A procurement specialist will review your requirements and send a formal quote with MOQ, grades, and shipping terms within 24 hours.

review.title: Specification review
review.text: We validate grade, quantity, and destination requirements against current capacity.

quote.title: Formal quote
quote.text: You receive pricing, MOQ, COA scope, and proposed incoterms (FOB/CIF).

ship.title: Export execution
ship.text: On approval, we coordinate processing, documentation, and sea freight booking.

rfq.docsNote: Include target moisture, particle size, or grade in your message for a faster quote.

errors.productInterest: Select at least one product category
